life_paths.name: The Leader
life_paths.desc: Born to lead, Life Path 1 individuals are independent, ambitious, and determined.

life_paths.name: The Peacemaker
life_paths.desc: Gifted with sensitivity, intuition, and creativity, Life Path 2 individuals are natural harmonizers.

life_paths.name: The Creator
life_paths.desc: Life Path 3 individuals are naturally creative, expressive, and charismatic.

life_paths.name: The Builder
life_paths.desc: Life Path 4 individuals are practical, disciplined, and hardworking.

life_paths.name: The Explorer
life_paths.desc: Life Path 5 individuals are adventurous, versatile, and freedom-loving.

life_paths.name: The Nurturer
life_paths.desc: Life Path 6 individuals are compassionate, responsible, and deeply caring.

life_paths.name: The Seeker
life_paths.desc: Life Path 7 individuals are analytical, intuitive, and deeply spiritual.

life_paths.name: The Achiever
life_paths.desc: Life Path 8 individuals are ambitious, powerful, and naturally gifted in leadership.

life_paths.name: The Humanitarian
life_paths.desc: Life Path 9 individuals are compassionate, idealistic, and driven by a desire to make a positive impact on the world.

life_paths.name: The Visionary
life_paths.desc: Life Path 11 is a Master Number associated with intuition, inspiration, and spiritual insight.

life_paths.name: The Disciplined Builder
life_paths.desc: Life Path 13/4 is a Karmic Debt number that emphasizes hard work, discipline, and perseverance.

life_paths.name: The Freedom Seeker
life_paths.desc: Life Path 14/5 is a Karmic Debt number that emphasizes freedom, adaptability, and personal growth through experience.

life_paths.name: The Spiritual Seeker
life_paths.desc: Life Path 16/7 is a Karmic Debt number associated with wisdom, introspection, and spiritual growth.

life_paths.name: The Independent Leader
life_paths.desc: Life Path 19/1 is a Karmic Debt number associated with leadership, independence, and self-reliance.

life_paths.name: The Master Builder
life_paths.desc: Life Path 22 is the most powerful Master Number, combining vision, leadership, and practicality.

life_paths.name: The Master Teacher
life_paths.desc: Life Path 33 is the Master Teacher, representing unconditional love, compassion, and selfless service.

testimonials.text: "My session was nothing short of revelatory. The accuracy with which the numbers reflected my life's patterns left me speechless. I finally understand why certain things kept repeating."
testimonials.name: Priya Malhotra

testimonials.text: "I was at a complete crossroads in my career. The reading gave me the courage and clarity to make a decision I'd been avoiding for two years. Genuinely life-changing."
testimonials.name: Rohan Kapoor

testimonials.text: "The relationship compatibility reading transformed how my partner and I communicate. Understanding our numbers made everything feel less like conflict and more like growth."
testimonials.name: Anjali Singh

testimonials.text: "Simply incredible. The insights into my personal year cycle explained exactly what I was feeling."
testimonials.name: Sarah T.
